title: MCP Server Security Hardening Skill
copyText:
Install:
curl -L https://heyclau.de/downloads/skills/mcp-server-security-hardening.zip -o mcp-server-security-hardening.zip && unzip -o mcp-server-security-hardening.zip -d ./mcp-server-security-hardening

Usage:
Apply this skill before exposing any MCP server to third-party clients or shared environments.

Asset:
# Trigger
"Run the MCP server security hardening skill against this MCP implementation."

# Required output
1) Threat model (auth, tool abuse, prompt injection, supply chain)
2) Concrete hardening patch plan
3) Logging and alerting requirements
4) Deployment gate checklist
detailMarkdown:
# MCP Server Security Hardening Skill

Secure MCP servers with strict tool boundaries, auth controls, dependency hygiene, and abuse-resistant runtime policies.

- **Category:** skills
- **Author:** JSONbored
- **Verification:** draft
- **Download trust:** first-party
- **Tags:** `mcp` `security` `hardening` `auth` `ai-infrastructure`

## Install
```bash
curl -L https://heyclau.de/downloads/skills/mcp-server-security-hardening.zip -o mcp-server-security-hardening.zip && unzip -o mcp-server-security-hardening.zip -d ./mcp-server-security-hardening
```

## Usage
Apply this skill before exposing any MCP server to third-party clients or shared environments.
